summary: Product-minded software engineer with experience shipping user-facing applications, internal tooling, integrations, and AI-assisted workflows. Strongest when the work needs both implementation rigor and plain-language reasoning about product and technical tradeoffs.

bullets: Deliver scoped product and platform work for clients who need execution more than process theater.
Build integrations, internal tooling, and AI-assisted workflows with an emphasis on maintainability.
Translate ambiguous technical problems into concrete plans that non-engineering stakeholders can evaluate.
Shipped web applications, experiments, and portfolio projects spanning consumer UX and operational tooling.
Worked across frontend systems, API design, deployment, debugging, and content-driven site architecture.
Focused on clean interfaces, stable abstractions, and reducing long-term maintenance cost.
